mapper.sql: select column_id, column_name, subject_id, group_name, group_sort, description, sort_order, enable_practice, paper_id, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time from daming_practice_column
mapper.select:
select null as column_id, null as column_name, #{subjectId} as subject_id, group_name, max(group_sort) as group_sort, null as description, 0 as sort_order, 1 as enable_practice, null as paper_id, null as create_user, null as create_time, null as update_user, null as update_time from daming_practice_column
subject_id = #{subjectId}
and group_name is not null and group_name <> ''
group by group_name order by max(group_sort) desc, group_name asc
mapper.insert: insert into daming_practice_column ( column_name, subject_id, group_name, group_sort, description, sort_order, enable_practice, paper_id, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time ) values ( #{columnName}, #{subjectId}, #{groupName}, #{groupSort}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{enablePractice}, #{paperId}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now() )
mapper.update: update daming_practice_column set paper_id = #{paperId}, update_time = now() where column_id = #{columnId}
